title: chrysophyllum oliviforme var. picardae
intro: Chrysophyllum oliviforme var. picardae, also known as Picard's West African tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chrysophyllum oliviforme var. picardae include its potential to treat fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark is typically used to make a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
